TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_caca', title = caca', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/caca'} }

S.FORM: == caca' == / matineng ci bayi misanga' tu caca'. siwkay nu caca' u caca' sa , nu sanga'en nu wuway saca penen. sapimabi' saca pahalhal. tinaku a kamu sicaca' śúČŤďÜŚ≠ź / sicaca' kita i putah malikalik. sicaca'ay śúČŤďÜŚ≠źÁöĄ / ci Dungi dada' ku sicaca'ay i niyazu'. u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika Ťó§śėĮÁúĀŤó§śóŹ(Ś≠łŚźć:Calameae) . šļĒÁĮÄŤäí(Miscanthus floridulus) . A mat is a piece of fabric material that generally is placed on a floor or other flat surface. Mats serve a range of purposes including: serving to clean items passed over it, such as a doormat, which removes dirt from the soles of shoes protecting that which is above the mat, such as a wrestling or gymnastics mat, or an anti-vibration mat protecting that which is beneath the mat, such as a place mat or the matting used in archival framing and preservation of documents and paintings providing a regular or flat surface, such as a cushioned computer mousepad Calameae is a palm tree tribe in the subfamily Calamoideae. Many of its members are rattans. Miscanthus floridulus, Pacific Island silvergrass, is a species of perennial grass in the Poaceae family.
S.PHON: == ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° == / matin…ôŇč ¶i baji misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶a Ē~ °. siwkaj nu ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° u ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° sa , nu saŇča Ē~ °…ôn nu wuwaj sa ¶a p…ôn…ôn. sapimabi Ē~ ° sa ¶a pańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ. tinaku a kamu si ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° *** / si ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° kita i putańß mar~…ĺikar~…ĺik. si ¶a ¶a Ē~ °aj **** / ¶i duŇči dada Ē~ ° ku si ¶a ¶a Ē~ °aj i nijazu Ē~ °. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika *****(**: ¶ar~…ĺam…ôa…ô) . ***(mis ¶antńßus fr~…ĺoridur~…ĺus) . a mat is a pi…ô ¶…ô of fabri ¶ mat…ôriar~…ĺ tńßat g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj is pr~…ĺa ¶…ôd on a fr~…ĺoor or otńß…ôr fr~…ĺat surfa ¶…ô. mats s…ôr*…ô a raŇč…ô of purpos…ôs in ¶r~…ĺudiŇč: s…ôr*iŇč to ¶r~…ĺ…ôan it…ôms pass…ôd o*…ôr it, su ¶ńß as a doormat, wńßi ¶ńß r…ômo*…ôs dirt from tńß…ô sor~…ĺ…ôs of sńßo…ôs prot…ô ¶tiŇč tńßat wńßi ¶ńß is abo*…ô tńß…ô mat, su ¶ńß as a wr…ôstr~…ĺiŇč or gjmnasti ¶s mat, or an anti-*ibration mat prot…ô ¶tiŇč tńßat wńßi ¶ńß is b…ôn…ôatńß tńß…ô mat, su ¶ńß as a pr~…ĺa ¶…ô mat or tńß…ô mattiŇč us…ôd in ar ¶ńßi*ar~…ĺ framiŇč and pr…ôs…ôr*ation of do ¶um…ônts and paintiŇčs pro*idiŇč a r…ôgur~…ĺar or fr~…ĺat surfa ¶…ô, su ¶ńß as a ¶usńßion…ôd ¶omput…ôr mous…ôpad ¶ar~…ĺam…ôa…ô is a par~…ĺm tr…ô…ô trib…ô in tńß…ô subfamir~…ĺj ¶ar~…ĺamoid…ôa…ô. manj of its m…ômb…ôrs ar…ô rattans. mis ¶antńßus fr~…ĺoridur~…ĺus, pa ¶ifi ¶ isr~…ĺand sir~…ĺ*…ôrgrass, is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of p…ôr…ônniar~…ĺ grass in tńß…ô poa ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj.
S.FORM: == caca' == / matineng ci bayi misanga' tu caca'. siwkay nu caca' u caca' sa , nu sanga'en nu wuway saca penen. sapimabi' saca pahalhal. tinaku a kamu sicaca' śúČŤďÜŚ≠ź / sicaca' kita i putah malikalik. sicaca'ay śúČŤďÜŚ≠źÁöĄ / ci Dungi dada' ku sicaca'ay i niyazu'. u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika Ťó§śėĮÁúĀŤó§śóŹ(Ś≠łŚźć:Calameae) . šļĒÁĮÄŤäí(Miscanthus floridulus) . A mat is a piece of fabric material that generally is placed on a floor or other flat surface. Mats serve a range of purposes including: serving to clean items passed over it, such as a doormat, which removes dirt from the soles of shoes protecting that which is above the mat, such as a wrestling or gymnastics mat, or an anti-vibration mat protecting that which is beneath the mat, such as a place mat or the matting used in archival framing and preservation of documents and paintings providing a regular or flat surface, such as a cushioned computer mousepad Calameae is a palm tree tribe in the subfamily Calamoideae. Many of its members are rattans. Miscanthus floridulus, Pacific Island silvergrass, is a species of perennial grass in the Poaceae family.
S.PHON: == ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° == / matin…ôŇč ¶i baji misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶a Ē~ °. siwkaj nu ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° u ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° sa , nu saŇča Ē~ °…ôn nu wuwaj sa ¶a p…ôn…ôn. sapimabi Ē~ ° sa ¶a pańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ. tinaku a kamu si ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° *** / si ¶a ¶a Ē~ ° kita i putańß mar~…ĺikar~…ĺik. si ¶a ¶a Ē~ °aj **** / ¶i duŇči dada Ē~ ° ku si ¶a ¶a Ē~ °aj i nijazu Ē~ °. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika *****(**: ¶ar~…ĺam…ôa…ô) . ***(mis ¶antńßus fr~…ĺoridur~…ĺus) . a mat is a pi…ô ¶…ô of fabri ¶ mat…ôriar~…ĺ tńßat g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj is pr~…ĺa ¶…ôd on a fr~…ĺoor or otńß…ôr fr~…ĺat surfa ¶…ô. mats s…ôr*…ô a raŇč…ô of purpos…ôs in ¶r~…ĺudiŇč: s…ôr*iŇč to ¶r~…ĺ…ôan it…ôms pass…ôd o*…ôr it, su ¶ńß as a doormat, wńßi ¶ńß r…ômo*…ôs dirt from tńß…ô sor~…ĺ…ôs of sńßo…ôs prot…ô ¶tiŇč tńßat wńßi ¶ńß is abo*…ô tńß…ô mat, su ¶ńß as a wr…ôstr~…ĺiŇč or gjmnasti ¶s mat, or an anti-*ibration mat prot…ô ¶tiŇč tńßat wńßi ¶ńß is b…ôn…ôatńß tńß…ô mat, su ¶ńß as a pr~…ĺa ¶…ô mat or tńß…ô mattiŇč us…ôd in ar ¶ńßi*ar~…ĺ framiŇč and pr…ôs…ôr*ation of do ¶um…ônts and paintiŇčs pro*idiŇč a r…ôgur~…ĺar or fr~…ĺat surfa ¶…ô, su ¶ńß as a ¶usńßion…ôd ¶omput…ôr mous…ôpad ¶ar~…ĺam…ôa…ô is a par~…ĺm tr…ô…ô trib…ô in tńß…ô subfamir~…ĺj ¶ar~…ĺamoid…ôa…ô. manj of its m…ômb…ôrs ar…ô rattans. mis ¶antńßus fr~…ĺoridur~…ĺus, pa ¶ifi ¶ isr~…ĺand sir~…ĺ*…ôrgrass, is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of p…ôr…ônniar~…ĺ grass in tńß…ô poa ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj.
